en_title: Nintendo Music Launches Web Player, With Over 4 Hours of Mario Kart World Tunes
cn_title: 任天堂音乐推出网页版，收录超4小时《马力欧卡丁车世界》曲目
subtitle: 耳朵有福了
opus_summary: 任天堂音乐服务新增网页播放器，并收录了Switch 2独占游戏《马力欧卡丁车世界》的130首曲目，总时长超过4小时13分钟。该服务为Nintendo Switch Online会员专属，目前已有超过130款游戏的原声带可供收听。玩家期待已久的《马力欧卡丁车世界》原声终于上线，未来还将追加更多自由漫游曲目。任天堂将本作定位为长青游戏，但自去年随Switch 2发售后，除少量调整外尚未推出重大更新。随着夏季发布计划展开，玩家正翘首以盼新一期任天堂直面会。

paragraphs.en: Nintendo Music has added its most-requested soundtrack to date — the toe-tapping tunes of Switch 2 exclusive Mario Kart World — and launched a new web player.
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂音乐近日添加了迄今为止呼声最高的原声带——Switch 2独占游戏《马力欧卡丁车世界》的动感旋律——并同步推出了全新的网页播放器。

paragraphs.en: The soundtrack streaming service can now be played from a browser on your PC, tablet or car screen, as well as via its previous dedicated smartphone app. (And yes, I'm listening to it right now as I type this.) Just head to music.nintendo.com to get started.
paragraphs.cn: 现在，除了原有的智能手机专用应用外，你还可以通过PC、平板或车载屏幕上的浏览器播放该流媒体服务。（没错，我打字这会儿正听着呢。）只需访问music.nintendo.com即可开始。

paragraphs.en: As ever, Nintendo Music is a perk of being a Nintendo Switch Online subscriber. More than 130 games now have their soundtracks preserved for you to dip into, from Pikmin to WarioWare, Luigi's Mansion to Super Mario Galaxy.
paragraphs.cn: 一如既往，任天堂音乐是Nintendo Switch Online订阅用户的专属福利。目前已有超过130款游戏的原声带可供你随时聆听，从《皮克敏》到《瓦力欧制造》，从《路易吉洋楼》到《超级马力欧银河》。

paragraphs.en: Fans had long been calling for Mario Kart World's enormous soundtrack to be added, and today that has now happened. 130 tracks encompassing 4 hours and 13 minutes of tunes are currently available from the racer, with more to come as its many Free Roam tunes are added in future updates.
paragraphs.cn: 玩家们长期以来一直呼吁加入《马力欧卡丁车世界》庞大的原声带，如今终于成真。这款赛车游戏目前提供了130首曲目，总时长4小时13分钟，未来更新中还将追加更多自由漫游模式的配乐。

paragraphs.en: Mario Kart World launched alongside the Switch 2 last year, and fans are eagerly awaiting news of more content for the game, which Nintendo has positioned as an evergreen title it hopes will continue selling throughout the console's life. Apart from a few tweaks and fixes, however, no major additions have arrived to date.
paragraphs.cn: 《马力欧卡丁车世界》去年随Switch 2一同发售，玩家们正热切期待更多游戏内容的消息。任天堂将本作定位为一款长青游戏，希望它能在主机整个生命周期内持续畅销。然而，除了一些微调和修复外，至今尚未推出任何重大更新。

paragraphs.en: Could all that change soon? Nintendo has already laid out some of its summer launches, though fans are eagerly awaiting word on what's to come for Switch 2 later this year. And as we approach a busy week of video game announcements, Mario watchers hope for news on a fresh Nintendo Direct sometime soon.
paragraphs.cn: 这一切会很快改变吗？任天堂已经公布了一些夏季发布计划，但玩家们仍在翘首以盼Switch 2今年晚些时候的消息。随着游戏界繁忙的发布周临近，马力欧粉丝们希望近期能迎来新一期任天堂直面会的消息。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。可通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系他，或在Bluesky上找到他。
